heading: Definitions
label: 4503d Definitions
notes: References in TextFor , as the date the Compact of Free Association with the Republic of Palau enters into effect, referred to in par. (3), see Proc. No. 6726, , 59 F.R. 49777, set out as a note under , Territories and Insular Possessions.Oct. 1, 1994Sept. 27, 1994section 1931 of Title 48

children.heading: Institutes of Tropical Forestry
children.label: 1 Institutes of Tropical Forestry
children.text: The term “Institutes of Tropical Forestry” means the Institute of Tropical Forestry in Puerto Rico and the Institute of Pacific Islands Forestry established under .section 6706 of title 7

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State
children.label: 3 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the 50 States, Guam, American Samoa, the Republic of Palau (until the Compact of Free Association enters into effect), Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.
